uncertain.note: 'ὀφελεῖ' — standard Swete reading is 'ἀφελεῖ' (fut. of ἀφαιρέω); cannot verify α/ο breathing clearly from image resolution.
'γαυλίαμα' — likely should be 'γαυρίαμα' (cf. 'ἀγαυρίαμα' following); cannot distinguish λ/ρ clearly in image.
Possible missing 'αὐτῆς' after 'πολυοχλισίας' — the apparatus entry 'αυτης] οἱ αἰχμαλωμα A' suggests body has αὐτῆς here; unclear from image.
